title: Rate Death and Rebirth and End of Evangelion
display_title: Rate Death and Rebirth and End of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Rate: Death & Rebirth and End of Evangelion             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Mon Jan 19, 2009 5:34 pm I'm not sure if this topic was made before but what would you give Death and Rebirth and End of Evangelion on a 1-10? For me: Death and Rebirth 6.5/10 End of Evangelion 10/10

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jan 19, 2009 6:00 pm http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2549 http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1786 Me? I liked Death, although the Rebirth that's on DVD isn't even the same Rebirth that was shown in theatres. For that version, you've got to be a pirate. I think I gave Death an 8 on MAL.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Mon Jan 19, 2009 9:52 pm Ornette wrote: http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2549 http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1786

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Jan 20, 2009 12:19 am D&R: 0.000000001% fem-Kaworu's EoE: OVER 9000 fem-Kaworu's
